title: Useful Commands
description: This mod adds 20 useful commands that any user can execute on your server.
body:
_This mod needs to be installed on the server to function. However, you can install it onto the client, so it will function in a single-player world, but not on public servers._

This is a mod that adds 20 useful commands that players on your server could execute at the permission level 0, so any player could execute them without cheats/OP.

Part of the commands in a screenshot:

![Some of the commands in a screenshot...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0d0189161cabf9c7b5461c8a420339a0d7e723b.png)

Here is the list of commands this mod includes (I misspelled useful [the first part of the command], as usefull for some reason, XD):

1. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentAirInfo** - Shows how many ticks of oxygen you have left.
2. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentArmorInfo** - Shows how many points of armor you have equipped.
3. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentBiomeTemperature** - Shows the temperature of the biome you're in.
4. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentDimension** - Shows the current dimension you are in (The Overworld, The Nether, or The End).
5. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentFoodInfo** - Shows how many points of Food, and Saturation you have.
6. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentHealthInfo** - Shows current H.P, and absorption H.P.
7. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentLightLevel** - Shows current light level of where you are standing.
8. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentPlayerHeight** - Shows how tall you are.
9. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentTimeIrl** - Shows the current date (mm-dd-yyyy format).
10. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentWalkSpeed** - Shows the walk speed of the player.
11. **/UsefullCommands:Events:Raid?** - Shows if there is a raid at your region, or not.
12. **/UsefullCommands:ExperienceInfo** - Shows how many experience levels you have, and how many experence points are needed to reach the next level.
13. **/UsefullCommands:ServerPlayerCount** - Shows how many players are connected to the server/world.
14. **/UsefullCommands:ShowCurrentCoordnates** - Shows current X, Y, and Z coordnates.
15. **/UsefullCommands:ShowCurrentItemsInHands** - Shows current item (and count) in your main-hand, and off-hand.
16. **/UsefullCommands:ShowCurrentXYZVelocities** - Shows current X, Y, and Z velocity (how fast you are moving).
17. **/UsefullCommands:ShowPlayerDisplayName** - Shows current display name (username) of the player.
18. **/UsefullCommands:TicksLeftOnFire** - Shows how many ticks you will be on fire for.
19. **/UsefullCommands:TicksYouHaveBeenFrozenFor** - Shows how many ticks you have been frozen for.
20. **/UsefullCommands:CurrentTime** - Shows the current time of day (there is a vanilla command that displays the time, but this one is for non-oped players, so they can access it too).

_All outputs from these commands are printed in chat._


<hr>


 **Side Features**
                             
                             

- Player respawn message (shown in Minecraft's action-bar), E.G "SandWhoop _Just Respawned!_". This also has a sound on respawn: _minecraft:entity.evoker.prepare_wololo_.

- Player death message (also shown in action-bar) E.G: "SandWhoop _Died._ You were holding  <count + item> in your main-hand, and <count + item> in your off-hand".

- Entity death sound (plays the sound: "_minecraft:entity.player.death_"), when any entity in the world/server dies.

<hr>

**Donation**

If you want, you can support me by donating with the link on this page.
